items.meaning: Don't watch such _______________ TV programs. (inform)
He was able to provide the police with some _______________ information. (value)
Is the fire in Carina Apartment Block called one of the natural _______________ .(disastrous)
The crops were _______________ damaged. (se'vere = serious)
The company will invest 2 million dollars to _____________ its factories. (modern)
Don't you believe in _____________ between men and women? (equal)
Do you have any kind of _____________ of purchase? (prove)
The story is set in an _____________ world. (imagine)
They waited and waited for something _____________ to happen. (excite)
_____________ ! You won the first prize. (congratulate)
We must use our natural resources _____________ . (economy)
He always wears _____________ shirt. (stripe)
I am not satisfied with my _____________ for the coming exam. (prepare)
The school was _____________ destroyed by fire. (complete)
Scientists are looking for an _____________ way to reduce energy consumption. (effect)
Nha Trang always attracts more and more _____________ . (sightseeing)
The old theater of our city is being enlarged and _____________ . (modern)
This book is very _____________. I found it boring. (inform)
The price of _____________ has gone up again. (electric)
They are old enough to be _____________ of their parents. (depend)
_____________, his father and my father used to be classmates. (interest)
After a year in English, now she can speak English _____________ . (fluency)
